case_title: KING CHARLES VS. PROGRESSIVE CHOICE INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHARLES, KING AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE CHOICE INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT. 8, 2010 APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS DETAINED BY THE COURT. MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT. 8, 2010 BY COMM. PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHARLES, KING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE CHOICE INSURANCE COMPANY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
